query: 3D printed brachytherapy applicators FDA material safety QA testing

results.title: 3D-printed patient-specific applications in orthopedics.
results.snippet:
PubMed ID: 30774470. 2016/10/14 00:00. PURPOSE: The purpose of this study was to evaluate the influence of print 
orientation on the edge strength of 3D-printed dental restorative resins 
indicated for definitive and interim use and compare them with milled materials.
MATERIALS AND METHODS: Specimens (14 ×14 ×2 mm) were additively manufactured in 
three orientations (0, 45, and 90 degrees) using five 3D printed resins: 
VarseoSmile Crownplus (VCP), Crowntec (CT), Nextdent C&B MFH (ND), Dima C&B
